text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Lunch break. Forever Young had called me over, but by the time I reached the table, someone was already there.

text_block_list.name: Forever Young
text_block_list.text:
Remember that everyday concept merch prototype I showed you a while back?
We're having a reveal party soon, so you should totally come! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Fr? I'm so there~!
Where's it at?

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
『Ladies and gentlemen from Japan, 
welcome to Los Angeles!』

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text: Through exhibitions and hands-on experiences, this event brings together people, technology, and ideas to pave the way for new possibilities in racing—

text_block_list.name: Visitor A
text_block_list.text:
Daddy! They're holding a fashion show
with racing outfits from all over the world!
Let's go watch it~!

text_block_list.name: Visitor B
text_block_list.text:
Your company's reputation has reached far beyond borders,
and I have been hoping to speak with you for some time.
Since we have this wonderful opportunity, I would love to—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
『RACING WORLD EXPO”...?』
...Like, what even is that?!

choice_data_list: This is just way too off the charts...
text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Looking at the brochure, it's like a racing festival that brings together companies on a global scale... I guess? And Yan-ko's booth is here too, right?

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Oh, Jordan, City... and you're here too!

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Oh, Jordan, City... and you as well!

choice_data_list: Yeah, had no idea it was overseas...
text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
『What a coincidence~!
Did Yan-ko-san invite all of you too?』

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
This Expo is a truly lovely event...
You can just feel the love for racing throughout the venue ♡

text_block_list.name: Forever Young
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for coming!
Haha, just kidding♪ Are you guys enjoying yourselves?

choice_data_list: Suggesting it...? Wait, don't tell me...
text_block_list.name: Forever Young
text_block_list.text:
Wow, since it's the very first one, all eyes are on us♪
Suggesting we do an Expo was totally
worth it!

text_block_list.name: Forever Young
text_block_list.text:
The Expo is hosted by my dad's company♪
And the mastermind behind it is M-E!

text_block_list.name: Young's Father
text_block_list.text: Young, the main event is about to start.

text_block_list.name: Forever Young
text_block_list.text:
Oh, for real
Well then, guess I'll go put on the finishing touches!

text_block_list.name: Forever Young
text_block_list.text:
Yep, we're doing a commemorative race♪
With the ones who call this place home—
Some big-name Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Forever Young
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna paint the world in my colors—
and drive everyone wild.
And it all starts right here♪

text_block_list.name: Visitor D
text_block_list.text:
She thinks they'll win?
On U.S. dirt?

text_block_list.name: Visitor E
text_block_list.text: They don't stand a chance against the local powerhouses.

choice_data_list: <size=38>If anyone can spark a true innovation, it's her!.</size>
<size=35>(The roadmap to victory must already be laid out</size>)
text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's only a natural reaction. The name Forever Young
hasn't made waves overseas yet. But—

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
That's right ♡ Yanko-san...
Is the kind of girl who absolutely gets things done once she sets her mind to it.
At least, that's what onee-chan said♪

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
You can do it!
Love-chan and I are right here with you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: CLANG!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Right? It's an insane race, but I honestly can't picture Yanko losing.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Like, Yanko's totally gonna pull it off, right?!
I mean, she's always come through like that up till now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: CLANG!

choice_data_list: <size=32>She must definitely have a strategy for victory in place!</size>
text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking back, the groundwork she spoke 
of during the overseas inspection 
Was likely about exhibiting at the Expo and making inquiries regarding this race.
If so—

text_block_list.name: Young's Father
text_block_list.text:
—That girl is incredible for believing she can do it.
Once she sets her sights on a goal, she takes the shortest path and firmly secures the results.

text_block_list.name: Young's Father
text_block_list.text:
Young...
Today, you're going to show the world 
what you're made of, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: CLANG!

choice_data_list: <size=32>She must definitely have a strategy for victory in place!</size>
text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking back, the groundwork she spoke 
of during the overseas inspection 
Was likely about exhibiting at the Expo and making inquiries regarding this race.
If so—

text_block_list.name: Young's Father
text_block_list.text:
—The world is a towering wall. But Young
has poured everything into winning, all the way up until today.

text_block_list.name: Young's Father
text_block_list.text:
All that's left now is to believe.
That my beloved child will live up to expectations—
And that she has the power to achieve it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: CLANG!

choice_data_list: <size=34>No wonder the local dirt racers are so powerful...!</size>
text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She shines despite the away turf—but 
local racers guard their pride. Showing power early, they refuse to yield the lead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Forever Young refuses to back down.
As if to show the future she will forge with her own hands, she rapidly closes the gap.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The winner of
this memorable race was...

text_block_list.name: Overseas Trainers
text_block_list.text:
Care to try a U.S.-
based training plan?

text_block_list.name: Foreign Company President
text_block_list.text:
A runner like you would make
for a great business partner!

text_block_list.name: Forever Young
text_block_list.text:
I'm really flattered
by the offers, but first...

text_block_list.name: Forever Young
text_block_list.text: With my roadmap—I'll bring innovation to the racing world!
